name: Dell Technologies Inc.
description: Dell Technologies Inc. is a leading global technology company that designs, develops, manufactures, and supports a comprehensive range of hardware, software, and services. The company operates through two primary segments: Infrastructure Solutions Group (ISG) and Client Solutions Group (CSG). Dell is a major provider of personal computers, servers, data storage solutions, and cloud infrastructure. In recent years, the company has significantly expanded its focus on artificial intelligence, offering high-performance AI servers and integrated solutions to help enterprises deploy and scale AI workloads efficiently across various environments.
